entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: The crop species Cicer arietinum L. used for protein estimation study

entities.name: PROTEIN CONTENT
entities.description: The amount of protein present in the seeds of the crop

entities.name: TECHNICON AUTO-ANALYZER METHOD
entities.description: A rapid colorimetric estimation of ammonia with phenol-hypochlorite reagents

entities.name: DYE-BINDING CAPACITY METHOD
entities.description: A rapid protein estimation method using acid orange-12 dye

entities.name: MODIFIED BIURET METHOD
entities.description: A rapid protein estimation method based on the work of Pinckney and Johnson and Craney

entities.name: MICROKJELDAHL PROCEDURE
entities.description: The standard procedure used as a benchmark for protein estimation

entities.name: SEED-COAT PIGMENTS
entities.description: Pigments in the seed coat that may interfere with protein estimation results

entities.name: FLOUR PARTICLE SIZE
entities.description: The size of flour particles which may affect the results of rapid protein estimation

entities.name: TIME OF SHAKING
entities.description: The duration of shaking which may affect the results of rapid protein estimation
